• Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated maps.
  • Features voxel-style mining, resource gathering, and base building in a shared world.
  • Supports singleplayer and multiplayer modes with real-time networking via MQTT.
  • Customizable player settings, shop upgrades, and cloud save functionality.
    class GameEngine { constructor() { this.canvas = $('gameCanvas'); this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d'); } }
    class ShopSystem { open() { $('shop-modal').classList.add('active'); this.updateUI(); } }

This web application is a 2D mining game with multiplayer capabilities, featuring procedurally generated maps, resource gathering, building mechanics, and a shop system for upgrades. The game uses MQTT for real-time networking and includes features like cloud saves, custom textures, and a dashboard for player statistics.
